svg.title: Advanced GNN Workflow Diagram
svg.desc: End-to-end GNN pipeline from raw graph data through message passing, pooling, and training to inference

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain raw graph data formats for GNNs: adjacency matrix, edge list, node features')
sendPrompt('What graph preprocessing steps are needed for GNNs? Normalization, sampling, augmentation')
sendPrompt('How is a PyG Data object constructed with node features, edge index, and edge attributes?')
sendPrompt('What is the input embedding layer in a GNN? Linear projection of raw node features')
sendPrompt('Explain message passing in GNNs: aggregation functions, GCN vs GAT vs GraphSAGE')
sendPrompt('How does the node update step work in GNNs using MLP and residual connections?')
sendPrompt('What normalization and activations are used in GNNs? BatchNorm, LayerNorm, ReLU, ELU')
sendPrompt('What graph pooling methods exist? Global mean/sum/max pool, DiffPool, TopK pooling')
sendPrompt('How is the prediction head designed for node, edge, and graph classification in GNNs?')
sendPrompt('Which loss functions are used for GNN tasks? Cross-entropy, MSE, margin loss, contrastive loss')
sendPrompt('What optimizers and learning rate schedulers work best for GNN training?')
sendPrompt('How do you evaluate GNNs? Accuracy, AUC, F1 for node, link, and graph tasks')
sendPrompt('How is GNN inference done at scale? Mini-batch sampling, ONNX export, batched subgraph')
